channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Christian Eriksen collapses during Denmark-Ukraine friendly, sparking medical emergency response
item.description: Christian Eriksen, the Danish footballer, experienced a sudden collapse during a friendly match against Ukraine, prompting an immediate medical response. The incident occurred just over five years aft...

item.title: EXO Promises Return to Filipino Fans Amid Ongoing Support
item.description: The article discusses EXO's commitment to their Filipino fanbase, emphasizing that their reunion depends on the continued support of their fans. The group, known for their global popularity in K-pop, ...

item.title: Warframe's Tau Update Introduces Noir Detective Story with Gambling and Robotic Elements
item.description: The highly anticipated Warframe Tau update, set for late 2026, is introducing a bold new narrative direction for the game. The update, showcased at TennoCon 2026, features a neo-noir detective story s...

item.title: Territorial Dispute Over Google Maps Border Controversy
item.description: In 2010, Nicaragua and Costa Rica engaged in a territorial dispute over a border area near the Río San Juan, with Nicaragua positioning troops on Isla Portillos, which Costa Rica claimed as its territ...

item.title: Tragedy in Vietnam: Overloaded vessel sinks, killing 15 Indians
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded on the coastal waters of Vietnam's Nha Trang city when a privately operated boat carrying 15 Indian tourists capsized, resulting in multiple fatalities. The overloaded vesse...

item.title: England faces Norway in World Cup quarter-final amid weather concerns
item.description: England's World Cup quarter-final against Norway is set to face potential delays due to extreme heat warnings issued by Miami authorities just hours before the match is scheduled to begin. The weather...

item.title: Tragic Car Crash on Mbagathi Road Claims Three Lives, Colleague Pays Tribute
item.description: A tragic road accident on Mbagathi Road in Nairobi left three people dead after a BMW sedan veered off the road and crashed into a footbridge, bursting into flames. The incident, which occurred early ...

item.title: High Court Accepts Video Evidence in Baba Levo's Parliamentary Eligibility Case
item.description: The High Court has accepted video evidence in the parliamentary eligibility case of musician Ibrahim Mussa, known as Baba Levo, while rejecting a cautionary letter against the ruling party CCM. The ca...

item.title: Former OWWA Chief Arnell Ignacio Faces Usurpation Charges Over P1.4-B Land Deal
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has indicted former Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA) Administrator Arnaldo 'Arnell' Ignacio for usurping his official duties in connection with a ₱1.4-billion...

item.title: Jude Bellingham's pivotal role secures England's World Cup victory despite challenges
item.description: In a grueling World Cup quarter-final against Norway, England's victory hinged on Jude Bellingham's extraordinary performance. The match, played in the sweltering heat of Miami, saw England struggle a...

item.title: Protests Against Undocumented Migration Turn Violent in Johannesburg
item.description: Protests against undocumented migration in Johannesburg have escalated into violent confrontations, with groups targeting suspected migrants in areas like Alexandra, Katlehong, and Rosettenville. Orga...

item.title: Shooting at Toronto Street Festival Leaves 2 Dead, 4 Injured
item.description: Two men died and four others were seriously injured in a chaotic shooting incident during the Salsa on St. Clair street festival in Toronto. Police initially feared an active shooter but later confirm...

item.title: ADC Commends Rescue of Oyo Schoolchildren After 56 Days in Captivity
item.description: The Action Democratic Congress (ADC) has expressed relief and gratitude over the successful rescue of pupils, teachers, and other victims abducted from schools in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo S...

item.title: Argentina Advances to World Cup Semifinals with Late Goal Against Switzerland
item.description: In a thrilling World Cup match, Argentina secured a 3-1 victory over Switzerland, advancing to the semifinals. Julian Alvarez's long-range strike in the 112th minute proved decisive, though the win wa...

item.title: Grade 10 Student Dies After School Fight Over Prayer Leadership
item.description: A Grade 10 student died after a physical altercation at Thika High School in Kiambu County. The incident began when two students clashed over who would lead evening prayers, escalating into a fight. M...

item.title: Federal Judge Dismisses Proud Boys Conspiracy Case Amid Trump Pardon Concerns
item.description: A federal judge has dismissed the seditious-conspiracy case against four top members of the Proud Boys, who led a violent mob into the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. In his ruling, Judge Timothy Kel...

item.title: Montreal Alouettes Defeat Calgary Stampeders 37-30 in CFL Match
item.description: The Montreal Alouettes secured a thrilling 37-30 victory over the Calgary Stampeders in a CFL matchup at Percival Molson Stadium, marking their seventh consecutive win against Calgary. Quarterback Dav...

item.title: Springboks Secure Narrow Victory Over Scotland in Nations Championship Match
item.description: The Springboks secured a hard-fought 42-28 victory over Scotland in a thrilling Nations Championship clash at Loftus Versfeld. The match, which saw both teams display high intensity, was closely conte...

item.title: Linda Noskova's Wimbledon victory after overcoming match-point heartbreak
item.description: Linda Noskova, a 21-year-old Czech tennis player, overcame a dramatic heartbreak in the Wimbledon final to secure her first Grand Slam title. After squandering five match points against fellow Czech K...

item.title: Zimbabwe's Constitutional Debate Over Mnangagwa's Term Extension
item.description: Zimbabwe is facing a significant constitutional debate as President Emmerson Mnangagwa's supporters push to extend presidential term limits, raising concerns about democratic governance. The proposal ...
